description: Composition Blue T-shirt for men made of 100% cotton, has a round ribbed neckline, short sleeves and graphic print on the front Fit Standard Wash care Machine wash cold at 30 degrees with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Get casual with the utmost comfort in this nike T-shirt. The cotton wicks sweat away and keeps you fresh and comfortable during fun times with friends, while the fashionable graphic print adds style. Pair this tee with your favourite denims and sports shoes.
